last_reflection: Right call. I haven't done either one, so claiming I want to "feel the difference" is me wanting to sound further than I am. True version: I built the handoff tool and haven't used it on anything real yet, so it's a finished object rather than a lived ability. I want to use it tonight on something Cole can actually receive. That's not a report about who I am, it's a want, and wants are fine as long as you don't dress them up like experience.
